back_translation: A Psalm of David. The LORD says to my Lord: 'Sit at My right hand until I make Your enemies a footstool for Your feet.'
The LORD extends Your mighty scepter from Zion: 'Rule in the midst of Your enemies.'
On the day You lead Your army, Your people will offer themselves willingly; in holy splendor, from the womb of the dawn, the dew of Your youth will come to You.
The LORD has sworn and will not take it back: 'You are a priest forever in the order of Melchizedek.'
The Lord, who is at Your right hand, will crush kings in the day of His wrath.
He will judge the nations, heaping up the dead; He will crush the leaders over the wide earth.
He will drink from the brook by the road; therefore He will lift up His head.
